data.title: Compal Showcases "One Integrated Solution" Rack-Level AI Infrastructure Architecture and Cross-Domain Applications at NVIDIA GTC 2026
data.description: Compal Electronics revealed their participation in NVIDIA GTC 2026, scheduled from March 16 to 19 in San Jose, California. The company, traded under Stock Code 2324, will showcase its latest AI data center innovations at Booth 107 during the event.

data.title: Your Part-Time Controller, LLC Ranks #59 On Accounting Today's List of Top 100 Firms
data.description: A Philadelphia-based company, Your Part-Time Controller, LLC (YPTC), has secured a position as one of the top 100 firms in the country for the fifth year in a row. In the latest rankings by Accounting Today, YPTC is placed at #59, a notable improvement from their previous ranking of #62 in 2025. This recognition underscores their success and growth in the industry. The 2026 Top 100 Firms report highlights their steady progress and standing within the accounting sector.

data.title: 2026 SUBARU OUTBACK NAMED TO AUTOTRADER'S BEST NEW CARS OF 2026
data.description: The editors have commended the latest 2026 Subaru Outback for its exceptional cargo utility, driving dynamics, on- and off-road capabilities, and stylish design. The vehicle was chosen from a vast selection of new cars on the market. The 2026 Subaru Outback can now be purchased, with prices starting at $34,995 MSRP. This model is gaining attention for its impressive features and is currently available for purchase.

data.title: Marelli's Zone Control Unit honored as "Engineering Product of the Year" at the Digital Engineering Awards 2026
data.description: In Saitama, Japan on March 13, 2026, Marelli's Zone Control Unit (ZCU) was awarded the "Commendable" recognition in the "Engineering Product of the Year" segment at the Digital Engineering Awards 2026. This prestigious accolade highlights global excellence in engineering innovation and digital technology. The award signifies the ZCU's notable impact and quality within the industry.

data.title: Netflix to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Los Gatos, California, on March 13, 2026, Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ: NFLX) revealed plans to release its financial results and business forecast for the first quarter of 2026. The information will be available on the company's investor relations website, http://ir.netflix.net, on Thursday, April 16th, 2026, around 1:01 p.m.

data.title: EltaMD Unveils UV Clear Blemish-Prone & Oil Balancing SPF 50, a Breakthrough Sunscreen for Acne-Prone Skin, on National Dermatologist Day
data.description: Today on the third annual National Dermatologist Day, EltaMD, the top dermatologist-recommended professional sunscreen brand, is set to ring the closing bell at the New York Stock Exchange in celebration. This Arizona-based company is recognized as the number one choice among dermatologists for sun protection. The event will take place on March 13, 2026, highlighting the brand's success and popularity within the industry.

data.title: Quest Events Announces Strategic Realignment to Strengthen Rental and Scenic Platforms
data.description: In Frisco, Texas, on March 13, 2026, Quest Events revealed a new strategic organizational restructuring plan aimed at enhancing market specialization and boosting the future expansion of its rental and scenic divisions in the live events sector. The realignment comes after the recent acquisitions of EventWorks, indicating a strategic move to solidify the company's position in the industry.

data.title: CLIQ Digital AG: Extraordinary General Meeting on 24 April 2026, to resolve on the Company's partial repurchase offer and the redemption of the repurchased shares
data.description: DÜSSELDORF, 13 March 2026 – CLIQ Digital AG announced that an extraordinary general meeting (EGM 2026) will be held on 24 April 2026 at 10:00 a.m. (CEST). The invitation for the EGM 2026 will be released soon in the Federal Gazette and on the company's website. This meeting was requested by shareholder Dylan Media B.V. on 10 March 2026, which was previously disclosed through an ad hoc announcement on the same day.

data.title: Beverly Hills Plastic Surgeon Dr. David Sayah Launches New Simply Males Website Focused on Modern Men's Aesthetic Treatments
data.description: Renowned cosmetic surgeon Dr. David Sayah from Beverly Hills has introduced the revamped SimplyMales.com website catering exclusively to men. The updated platform offers a comprehensive range of male-focused treatments and services. Visitors can access valuable resources and details on various aesthetic and wellness procedures on the site.

data.title: Nanodropper Launches the First-Ever "Eye Drop Score" to Help Patients Improve Their Eye Drop Routine
data.description: A recently unveiled self-assessment tool aims to assist individuals utilizing glaucoma, chronic dry eye, and post-operative eye medications in gauging the efficacy of their treatment regimen. Introduced on March 13, 2026, in Rochester, Minnesota, Nanodropper Inc. presented the Eye Drop Score quiz. This quiz is designed to evaluate the effectiveness of the treatment plan for such individuals, allowing them to better understand their eye health.

data.title: The acquisition of Creekstone and Gable Point, a 374-unit multifamily portfolio in East Dallas, marks another exciting step forward for Clover Capital Partners
data.description: In Dallas on March 13, 2026, Clover Capital Partners proudly declared the successful acquisition of two new assets, Creekstone and Gable Point, following a rigorous process. This acquisition brings 374 multifamily units under their ownership.
GDP Revision Shock, Sticky Inflation Fan Stagflation Fears: What's Moving Markets Friday?

data.title: Pete Hegseth advocates for David Ellison to swiftly acquire CNN, raising concerns of pro-Trump bias.
data.description: The comments raised worries that the possible new owner of CNN could potentially steer its reporting more favorably towards Trump, sparking concerns among viewers.

data.title: Bankers enticed to join Pentagon with exclusive access to officials and fundraising ops. Firm promises rare chances for profit.
data.description: A headhunting company recently delivered a pitch to Wall Street investors, proposing to connect them with the Pentagon for exclusive access to government officials and fundraising prospects with foreign sovereigns.

data.title: PIP Labs reduces workforce as Story Protocol focuses on AI, releasing multiple employees and contractors to pursue new opportunities.
data.description: The group behind Story Protocol has recently laid off a number of workers and hired personnel as they delve into possibilities related to AI agents.

data.title: Former $3B revenue CEO Alan Turfe elected chair of Western Michigan University Board of Trustees
data.description: The chairperson of Zoom Home Lending is now at the helm of the WMU Board of Trustees in Kalamazoo, Michigan, as of March 13, 2026. Alan Turfe, a former CEO with a revenue of $3 billion, has been chosen as the new chair unanimously. Apart from his role at Zoom Home Lending, he will now be leading the Board of Trustees at Western Michigan University.

data.title: Pilot Photonics Laser selected by Finchetto for Optical Network Switch
data.description: Finchetto has collaborated with Pilot Photonics to implement an optical network switch for AI and data communication. The Irish company, Pilot Photonics, known for its nano-second switching tunable laser technology, will be providing the key component. The partnership was announced in Los Angeles on March 13, 2026. This collaboration is poised to leverage Pilot Photonics' expertise in nano-second switching tunable lasers to enhance Finchetto's optical network switch technology for advanced applications in AI and data communications.
